steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the main purpose of the passage overall — not a detail it mentions, but what the whole text is trying to do.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — To show how the play *A Raisin in the Sun* influenced Ward and Hooks.: The passage opens with an Edwards play, not A Raisin in the Sun, and never argues it influenced Ward and Hooks. ✗
  • Choice B — To bring attention to a work by Gus Edwards.: Edwards's play appears only as an example of the kind of work NEC produced — it is not the passage's focus. ✗
  • Choice C — To describe how Ward and Hooks's creative partnership changed over time.: The passage never traces an evolution or change in their partnership. ✗
  • Choice D — To discuss the origin and importance of the NEC.: The passage explains how Ward and Hooks met, what they envisioned, when NEC was founded (1967), and why it mattered (a forum for Black playwrights). That covers both origin and importance. ✓
That matches Choice D — To discuss the origin and importance of the NEC..
